positive: A minimalist, abstract representation of a mountain peak emerging from stylized, rolling fog. The design features clean, bold silhouettes of jagged peaks and soft, flowing vapor masses. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette of deep indigo blue, slate gray, and pristine cream white. The composition should be centralized and vertically balanced, ideal for a chest print on apparel. Incorporate negative space effectively to enhance the graphic feel. Style: Modern geometric illustration, vector art aesthetic, highly scalable, single continuous print layer, flat design, sharp edges.
